rulings.Case Title: LUCIANO COSLOVICH et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT THE DOW CHEMICAL COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: LUCIANO COSLOVICH et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT THE DOW CHEMICAL COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. WHAT DISTINGUISHES BOCKRATH FROM THIS CASE IS THE ALLEGATION THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES ARE ATTRIBUTABLE TO A SINGLE TOXIN, ASBESTOS. IN ESSENCE, PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANTS KNEW OF THE DANGERS OF ASBESTOS, PLACED ASBESTOS AND/OR PRODUCTS IN COMMERCE WITH ASBESTOS, FAILED TO WARN PLAINTIFF AND PLAINTIFF WAS INJURED. DEFENDANT'S KNOWLEDGE AND PLAINTIFF'S LACK OF KNOWLEDGE MAKE TARMANN INAPPLICABLE TO THIS CASE. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: EARL BECK et al VS. AMERICA ASBESTOS CO.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For A New Trial On Deft Huber, Hunt Nichols Mtn For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, For Reconsideration Of This Courts Order Granting Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 17. PLAINTIFFS EARL BECK, CHRISTINE BECK, CHRISTINE BECK, CHRISTINE BECK, GREGORY BECK, JOSEPH BECK, CINDY LIND AND DEBBIE SMITH'S MOTION For A New Trial On DEFENDANT Huber, Hunt Nichols MOTION For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, For Reconsideration Of This Courts Order Granting Summary Judgment. A HEARING IS REQUIRED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SHARON B. SIEGEL VS. ALLEN JOEL RUBY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Clarification/Reconsideration;Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANTS ALLEN RUBY AND RUBY & SCHOFIELD'S Motion For Clarification/Reconsideration IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1008. MOREOVER, THE COURT DID ADDRESS THE ISSUES RAISED WHEN IT DETERMINED THAT THE UNDERLYING CASES WERE A PART OF A SINGLE REPRESENTATION. THE RELIEF DEFENDANT NOW SEEKS, ASSUMING IT WAS A PART OF THE RELIEF REQUESTED, IS SIMPLY AN EFFORT TO ADJUDICATE DISCRETE ISSUES WITHIN PLAINTIFF'S CAUSES OF ACTION, THAT IS NOT PERMITTED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 437 C. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MARCIA SHEW VS. RODOLFO BILLEDO et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 3. CROSS DEFENDANT MARCIA SHEW'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CROSS COMPLAINT FAILS TO SPELL OUT HOW THE CLAIM FOR CONVERSION IS RELATED TO THE CLAIMS ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: THE BURLINGTON INSURANCE COMPANY VS. NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANT NATIONAL AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NATIONAL HAD NO DUTY TO DEFEND UNDER THE "OPERATIONS EXCLUSION" WHICH APPLIES TO PUMPS. THE INJURY OCCURRED AS A CONSEQUENCE OF THE OPERATION OF THE PUMP. IT MATTERS NOT HOW THE PUMP BECAME A PART OF THE TRUCK. THE WORD "INCLUDING" MAKES CLEAR THAT THE POLICY EXCLUDES "PUMPS" NOT JUST THE IDENTIFIED PUMPS. THE NATURE OF THE INSURED'S BUSINESS IS NOT RELEVANT TO THE INTERPRETATION OF COVERAGE. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 5. PLAINTIFF THE BURLINGTON INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: FAIR OAKS APARTMENTS, LTD VS. PATRICIA CAREY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 17, 2007, LINE 15. DEFENDANT PATRICIA CAREY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE NOTICE TO QUIT FOR NUISANCE COMPLIES WITH STATE LAW, CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1161(4) AND GOOD CAUSE IS STATED WITHIN THE MEANING OF PARAGRAPH 23(E) OF THE LEASE. PLAINTIFF PLEADS AN EXEMPTION FROM THE RENT ORDINANCE AND PLEADING A "NUISANCE" CONSTITUTES "JUST CAUSE". THE ALLEGED BREACH DOES NOT REQUIRE PLAINTIFF TO ATTACH ADDENDA OR LEASE ATTACHMENT. =(302/PJM/PB)
